# Subscription.MetaFragment method

Returns the `_meta` fragment to attach to a change notification on this stream — carrying the subscription id (§10.4, §10.5).

```csharp
public JsonObject MetaFragment()
```

## Return Value

A `_meta` object with the subscription id.
